name: ground_truth_cm6_config_settings_ambiguous
description: Ground-truth fixture modeled on the Example System IATT assessment pattern for CM-6 configuration settings. This simulates a genuinely ambiguous scenario where STIG scan results are partially available but inconclusive — some systems show compliant checks while others have not been scanned. The LLM returns low confidence (0.3, just under the 0.35 threshold), triggering the confidence-floor abstain gate at engine/assessor.py:1075-1094. Tests the confidence-floor gate with a realistic assessment scenario rather than the synthetic CCI-000017 used in abstain_low_confidence.json.

ccis_row.guidance: 000363: The organization establishes configuration settings for information technology products employed within the information system.
ccis_row.procedures: The organization conducting the inspection/assessment examines the information system to ensure the organization being inspected/assessed establishes documented configuration settings for information technology products.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- STIG checklist results (partial) — 3 of 7 boundary hosts scanned; remaining 4 hosts not yet baselined.
- Configuration management policy — references DISA STIG baselines but does not enumerate specific settings per product.

llm_stub_proposals.narrative: Examined configuration management policy and partial STIG scan results; confirmed that scanned hosts have DISA STIG baselines applied and documented in the configuration management plan.
